nasb.text: Then David sent to the house for Tamar, saying, “Go now to your brother Amnon’s house, and prepare food for him.”

esv.text: Then David sent home to Tamar, saying, “Go to your brother Amnon’s house and prepare food for him.”

cnv.text: 大衛就派人到宮裡去對他瑪說：“你到你哥哥暗嫩的屋裡去，為他預備食物。”

ccb.text: 大卫便派人进宫对她玛说：“你去你哥哥暗嫩房里为他预备食物吧。”
